# Copilot Instructions

This is a PowerShell 7.0+ module project. For full conventions, architecture, build commands, and contribution workflow, read [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md).

Key file locations: `PSAnthropic/Public/` (exported), `PSAnthropic/Private/` (internal), `Tests/`, `docs/`.

Before committing: `./test-local.ps1`
